raw_consumer_statement:
I worked for XXXX. XXXX XXXX XXXX  I received emails from a fraudulent organization called XXXX XXXX XXXX. I also received a fraudulent charge on my card for {$2000.00}. I contacted CitiCard for help, I was given a fraud Dept email address to send it to from that rep and, due to the most recent call, I found out that it was never filed and the emails cant be found. They are supposed to report and input every notification about fraud and it was never done. 
I was forced to quit my job with XXXX because of the eronious charge. I have received absolutely no help from the FBI, nor, XXXX. Without question there is fraudulent activity going on within Citibank. CitiBank needs to be investigated. Please assist forthwith.
